===
module_long
===
a=Mod.Sub.func
a=Mod.Sub.func(a)
a=Mod.Sub.Tag(a)
---

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (variable_expr
        (module)
        (module)
        (identifier))))
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (function_call_pnc_expr
        caller: (variable_expr
          (module)
          (module)
          (identifier))
        args: (variable_expr
          (identifier)))))
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (function_call_pnc_expr
        caller: (tag_expr
          (tag
            (module)
            (module)
            (identifier)))
        args: (variable_expr
          (identifier))))))

===
module_long_type
===
a:Mod.List(a)
a:Mod.Sub.List(a)
---

(file
  (annotation_type_def
    (annotation_pre_colon
      (identifier))
    (apply_type
      (concrete_type)
      type_args: (apply_type_arg
        (bound_variable))))
  (annotation_type_def
    (annotation_pre_colon
      (identifier))
    (apply_type
      (concrete_type)
      type_args: (apply_type_arg
        (bound_variable)))))
